title: NPI and taxonomy correctness
headline: H9 3/10,856,109 NPIs fail structural+Luhn. H10 — 0.789% of 10.9M NDH NPIs are NOT in NPPES; 3.49% are deactivated in NPPES; 0.000% have entity-type mismatch (95.72% clean). H11 — 94.9% of Practitioners match NPPES on full name (exact); 56.3% of Organizations match NPPES on business name (exact). H12 — 99.83% of 7.1M NDH Practitioner.qualification NUCC codes are valid in NUCC v17.0. NDH PractitionerRole.specialty uses CMS Medicare Physician Specialty Types (100.0% of specialty-bearing roles), NOT NUCC. H13 — 92.02% of 7.1M NDH Practitioners agree with NPPES on primary taxonomy code.
notes: Source: bigquery-public-data.nppes.npi_raw (latest update 2026-02-09, 9.37M NPIs) + .healthcare_provider_taxonomy_code_set_170 joined against NDH 2026-04-09. ~8-week gap window means NPIs deactivated between 2026-02-09 and 2026-04-09 may appear active in NPPES — known caveat. H10: Practitioner — 7,124,478 ok / 56,157 not in NPPES / 260,534 deactivated / 44 enumerated as org in NPPES. Organization — 3,266,647 ok / 29,548 not in NPPES / 118,701 deactivated / 0 enumerated as individual. H11 uses exact case-insensitive match after TRIM+UPPER; Jaro-Winkler ≥0.85 = v2 upgrade. H12 NOTE: NDH PractitionerRole.specialty uses CMS Medicare Physician Specialty Types with system URI https://www.cms.gov/files/document/acceptable-physician-specialty-types-py-2025.pdf (codes like '14-50' = 'PRACTITIONER - NURSE PRACTITIONER'), NOT NUCC. NUCC codes appear on Practitioner.qualification.code with system http://nucc.org/provider-taxonomy (7,124,017 of 7,441,213 Practitioners). H12's metric is validity of those NUCC codes against the v17.0 code set (7,112,042 valid of 7,124,017 populated). NUCC v17.0 is the latest version in bigquery-public-data; if NDH uses a newer code set, codes from later releases would appear invalid here (upgrade to current quarterly NUCC + accept-last-3-years window = v2). H13 compares NUCC primary taxonomy NDH→NPPES only for Practitioners where NDH.qualification.system = http://nucc.org/provider-taxonomy AND NPPES entity_type_code = 1.
